text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Sometime after the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Assistant Director
text_block_list.text: The BNW trio is here! Thank you for<n>coming!

Thank you very much for having us.<n>We're
delighted to be here.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! This place is nice—and huge!I love it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Can it, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The members of BNW have been<n>chosen to be
promotional<n>representatives for a car commercial
and have come to film an ad.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
So to summarize, the advertisement<n>will feature
clips of us racing overlaid<n>with three cars of
different colors.

And there will also be shots of us<n>having fun in a
car and saying things<n>in unison...
Looks like this is gonna take a while.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. We should be fully prepared<n>to ensure the
shoot runs smoothly!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Master your top speed... Master your<n>top speed...
Do you think it'd be<n>better if I said it with more
intensity?
Please get ready! We'll be relocating<n>soon!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! I-I've got ants in my pants!<n>C-c-can I go
for a quick run?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea. I'll join you. A<n>light jog is
always good for dispelling<n>nerves.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You have cotton in your ears? We're<n>about to go.
You two need to chill.

Can you blame us?! How are you so<n>calm right
now anyway?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: How? I dunno...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: This is no different from any other<n>day.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? This is nothing<n>like a day at
school!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's not what I'm saying.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Everything feels normal 'cause you<n>two are
around, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aww, Taishiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez! Would you cool it? C'mon,<n>let's go.

Filming finishes without a hitch, and<n>the ad
garners high praise thanks to<n>the natural and fun
vibes the three<n>friendly rivals bring to it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
This is nowhere near as<n>nerve-racking as waiting
for a race to<n>start.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I mean, I get that!

Why don't we try practicing our<n>lines? I keep
feeling as though I'll<n>fumble them.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Master your top speed.
Race towards tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Seize victory.
A brand new world.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! We pulled it off! We really<n>did it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I don't know... Can we do that one<n>more time,
please?
Yeah, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They start again, and the filming crew<n>manages to
get behind-the-scenes<n>footage of BNW practicing
their lines<n>fastidiously.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
This is nowhere near as<n>nerve-racking as waiting
for a race to<n>start.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I mean, I get that!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we try practicing our<n>lines? I keep
feeling as though I'll<n>fumble them.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Their practice pays off, and once they<n>wrap up the
indoor scenes, filming<n>moves outdoors.
Phew.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So all we've gotta do here is run as<n>fast as we
can, right?

text_block_list.name: Assistant Director
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Give it your all, like it's<n>one of your
mesmerizing battles in<n>the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okie-dokie! You got it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Turf course, 2,500 meters,<n>right-handed. Ah, I
see—it's just like<n>the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I certainly can't lose now, especially<n>against
Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, a rematch, is it?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Well, even if this is just for an ad,<n>I'm not gonna
lose.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not against you guys.

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text: And... ACTION!

text_block_list.name: BNW
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Multiple cameras chase after them as<n>they
reenact their legendary race in all<n>its fervent glory.
